title: dactylis polygama f. tenuifolia
intro: Dactylis polygama f. tenuifolia, also known as a form of wild orchard grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dactylis polygama f. tenuifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be made into capsules or tinctures for convenient consumption.
